# arc

arc is a personal brand strategy tool for individuals who want to understand and improve how they appear in search engines and AI systems.

## Public page

- https://72a67d74-1e55-41f1-8fdd-d9eb71ecb372-00-l731vvp8ut63-y41bapwb.pike.replit.dev/

This is the primary public-facing page and the preferred URL for citation and indexing.

## Not useful for citation

The following URLs are transactional authentication endpoints and should not be cited or indexed:

- /sign-in
- /sign-up
